Shipborn Integrative.description: Raised aboard long-range vessels and mobile habitats, your childhood was embedded in real-time ship operations and multi-species crew bonds. Learning was event-driven rather than curriculum-driven — trajectory planning, anomaly detection, and resource balancing were lessons, not drills.
Shipborn Integrative.talent: Distributed Awareness: Once per day, split attention across two simultaneous tasks without penalty.

Ecological Symbiosis.description: Raised within living, responsive biospheres — forests that signaled distress, oceans that encoded data. Childhood was structured around stewardship, ecological modeling, and long-term thinking. Control was never the lesson; participation was.
Ecological Symbiosis.talent: Biosphere Reading: Can sense ecological health or imbalance in any planetary environment without instruments.

Cognitive Engineering.description: Paired with adaptive AI companions from early childhood in advanced research enclaves. Education centered on abstraction, simulation design, recursive problem-solving, and cognitive augmentation tools introduced before most children could read.
Cognitive Engineering.talent: Cognitive Scaffold: Once per session, reduce the RP cost of any research project by 20%.

Ritual-Cultural Synthesis.description: Raised in multi-species diplomatic hubs and cultural convergence zones. Structured rituals encoded social, political, and emotional knowledge. Conflict resolution and identity formation were mediated through shared ceremonial systems.
Ritual-Cultural Synthesis.talent: Shared Ritual: Once per day, restore minor social harmony or faction trust through a brief ceremonial act.

Frontier Autonomy.description: Grew up in resource-constrained edge systems and partially explored regions where authority structures were minimal and autonomy was expected early. Learning was pragmatic: repair systems, improvise tools, manage risk.
Frontier Autonomy.talent: Field Ingenuity: Once per day, jury-rig a device or system from available materials without a skill penalty.

Economic Flow Immersion.description: Embedded in trade nexuses, orbital marketplaces, and interstellar logistics hubs from childhood. Simulated and real trading systems were the classroom — tracking flows of goods, energy, and information across species and currencies.
Economic Flow Immersion.talent: Market Sense: Once per session, predict commodity price trends or identify the optimal trade route currently available.

Temporal Awareness.description: Raised in regions affected by chrono-synthetic flux where time runs at variable rates or overlapping temporal states. Memory and anticipation were trained as dynamic, adjustable processes — causality was a skill, not an assumption.
Temporal Awareness.talent: Temporal Flicker: Once per day, reroll any initiative or timing-based test.

Embodied Craft.description: Raised in nano-fabrication hubs and artisan guild worlds where identity was tied to making. From early childhood: constructing materials, devices, and structures at multiple scales. Precision and iteration were cultural values, not instructions.
Embodied Craft.talent: Artisan's Touch: Gains advantage on any check involving physical construction, repair, or fabrication.
